reasoning: The control CP-2(6) focuses on ensuring that there are alternate processing and storage sites, which is a contingency planning measure primarily applicable to infrastructure-level services such as databases and virtual machines. Kubernetes itself does not directly manage infrastructure-level redundancy or multi-availability zone deployments. These are typically handled by the underlying cloud provider's infrastructure services. Kubernetes can be deployed across multiple zones for high availability, but this is more of an architectural decision rather than a specific security control that can be automated within Kubernetes.
title: Contingency Plan - Contingency plan | alternate processing and storage sites nist sp 800-53, r ev
